match.userMessage:
The camera follows with a steady handheld tracking motion as Scarlett rises from her crouch at the shoreline, turns toward the water, and takes two measured steps into the shallows. Foam swirls softly around her calves with each forward movement while the coral lipstick tube stays planted upright in the wet sand behind her. Small waves lap continuously at the shore, their white foam patterns shifting and receding across the glistening sand.

gentle ocean waves lapping on shore with soft foam fizz. water splashing around calves, soft footsteps in wet sand.

Single continuous shot, no cuts. Avoid jitter and bent limbs.
